title: Literature Workflow Runner Summary
description: Advisory contract for scripts/literature_workflow.py JSON output. It is permissive and allows additional fields for backward compatibility.

steps.description: Commands actually executed by the runner.

planned_steps.description: Human-readable plan or dry-run step list.

errors.description: Blocking errors or advisory validation errors.

initial_state.description: Workflow state before execution when available.

final_state.description: Workflow state after execution or inspection when available.

next_action.description: Recommended next action from final_state or initial_state.

network_required.description: Whether this action would require network access.

write_operations.description: Human-readable write operations planned or possible for this action.
